name: dev-pipeline: Agent Orchestrator
description: Polls Calvinball every 15 min via OAuth2. Code nodes filter and gate (no IF nodes). Dispatches via SSH: Wormwood (Haiku), Tracer (Sonnet), Moe (Opus). Zero tokens when idle.

parameters.command: test -f /tmp/wormwood.lock && kill -0 $(cat /tmp/wormwood.lock) 2>/dev/null && echo busy || echo free

=export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH && export GH_TOKEN={{ $json.ghToken }} && echo $$ > /tmp/wormwood.lock && trap 'rm -f /tmp/wormwood.lock' EXIT && CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN={{ $json.claudeToken }} /Users/mike/.local/bin/claude -p --agent dev-pipeline:miss-wormwood --model haiku --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence 'Process items for triage: {{ $json.payload }}'
test -f /tmp/tracer.lock && kill -0 $(cat /tmp/tracer.lock) 2>/dev/null && echo busy || echo free

=export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH && export GH_TOKEN={{ $json.ghToken }} && echo $$ > /tmp/tracer.lock && trap 'rm -f /tmp/tracer.lock' EXIT && CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN={{ $json.claudeToken }} /Users/mike/.local/bin/claude -p --agent dev-pipeline:tracer-bullet --model sonnet --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence 'Review items: {{ $json.payload }}'
test -f /tmp/moe.lock && kill -0 $(cat /tmp/moe.lock) 2>/dev/null && echo busy || echo free

=export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH && export GH_TOKEN={{ $json.ghToken }} && echo $$ > /tmp/moe.lock && trap 'rm -f /tmp/moe.lock' EXIT && CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN={{ $json.claudeToken }} /Users/mike/.local/bin/claude -p --agent dev-pipeline:moe --model opus --dangerously-skip-permissions --no-session-persistence --max-budget-usd 5.00 'Process work item: {{ $json.payload }}'
